message:
test(metrics): add 18 property-based tests for MetricsSnapshot Prometheus rendering (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Properties cover HELP/TYPE/value triples, sanitized prefix, valid identifiers,
parseable numbers, event bus presence/absence, metric count consistency,
non-finite float handling, db_write_age casting, and deterministic output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
